releaseNotes: 1.6.1 - Removed metrics/health check/state folder, WiFi fix + DISM/SFC checker + deep cleanup resources, 9 game quick launch, real-time registry tweak state detection.
1.6.0 - 5 dropdown tweaks, tier-specific power plans, profiles removed, blue glow UI, update check every launch, MSI auto-launch after install.
1.5.9 - Added uninstall/debloat options (Edge, Copilot apps, Microsoft 365 apps) plus tier summary panel and extra UI animations.
1.5.8 - Added applied/total tweak counter, removed non-working History/Discord Guide/Owner Panel UI, and improved screen/list animations.
1.5.7 - Fixed update flow to always compare against running assembly version and keep automatic checks working after earlier upgrades.
1.5.6 - Hardening pass: reliable state persistence, startup save-race guards, and Discord secret moved to environment variable.
1.5.5 - Fixed local profile save/load, login persistence reliability, tweak health check crash, and settings persistence across restarts/updates.
1.5.4 - Fixed Win32 dropdown apply crash, power plan apply crash, and Discord login persistence after relaunch.
1.5.3 - Single Win32 Priority Separation tweak with hex dropdown; recommended 0x26 shows blue glow. Bump patch on each release.
1.5.2 - Cleaned UI (removed FPS overlay, dependency checker, accent picker), fixed restore point, theme switching, login persistence, auto-relaunch after update.
Dashboard: live CPU/GPU/RAM counters, Launch Fortnite/Valorant, View Changelog.
Settings: Dark/Light/System theme switch, auto-update toggle.
Login: encrypted local file persistence (DPAPI) survives restarts and updates.
Auto-update: silent MSI install + automatic re-launch of new version.
325 tweaks total, 85 Free tier tweaks visible without login.
